calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Jan-11-2021 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

10:50a.m. The matter was called. No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court noted that the tentative ruling indicated the possibility of the matter going off calendar. There being no appearance by anyone, the Petition for Spousal Property is off calendar.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
